content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Nabu Global FZE: Creative Performance Designer Anywhere in the World Sharjah Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Video Editing (Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere), and AI Chatbots Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5218/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Dubai, UAE <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://nabuglobal.com">http://nabuglobal.com</a> </p> <p>We are looking for a <strong>creative, results-driven designer</strong> who understands that great design is not just about aesthetics — it’s about performance.</p> <p>This role is ideal for someone who combines <strong>design skills, AI tools, and marketing thinking</strong> to create visuals that capture attention and drive conversions.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h2>&nbsp;</h2> <h2><span><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li>Design high-performing creatives for digital campaigns (ads, landing pages, social media)</li> <li>Work primarily in <strong>Canva for speed and execution</strong>, while also using <strong>Adobe tools (Photoshop, Illustrator)</strong> when needed</li> <li>Use <strong>AI tools</strong> to create images, videos, and visual concepts</li> <li>Collaborate with the marketing team to develop <strong>conversion-focused visual strategies</strong></li> <li>Continuously test and optimize creatives based on performance data</li> <li>Stay up to date with <strong>design trends, AI tools, and new technologies</strong></li> <li>Bring ideas, concepts, and improvements — not just execute tasks</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h2>&nbsp;</h2> <h2><span><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li>Experience with <strong>Adobe tools (Photoshop, Illustrator)</strong><br><em>(Even if you mainly use Canva — Adobe knowledge is important)</em></li> <li>Strong experience using <strong>Canva for fast content production</strong></li> <li>Experience with <strong>AI tools for image and video creation</strong><br><em>(e.g. Midjourney, DALL·E, Runway, Pika, VEO etc.)</em></li> <li>Experience in creating AI short-form videos and avatars is a big advantage</li> <li>Understanding of <strong>digital marketing and visual communication</strong></li> <li>Basic knowledge of <strong>HTML &amp; CSS</strong> <em>(big plus)</em></li> <li>Strong creative thinking and attention to detail</li> <li>Someone who follows trends and enjoys working with <strong>new technologies</strong></li> <li>Fast learner who adapts quickly to changes</li> <li>Proactive mindset — brings ideas and solutions</li> <li>Focused on <strong>results and performance</strong>, not just design</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h2>&nbsp;</h2> <h2><span>⚡&nbsp;<strong>What Makes You a Great Fit</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li>You understand that design = <strong>conversion</strong></li> <li>You move fast and execute efficiently</li> <li>You are curious about AI and actively use it in your workflow</li> <li>You think like a marketer, not just a designer</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h2>&nbsp;</h2> <h2><span><strong>Bonus Points</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li>Experience creating <strong>performance ads (Meta, Google, native ads)</strong></li> <li>Experience with <strong>video creation/editing (AI or traditional tools)</strong></li> <li>Experience working with <strong>landing pages and funnels</strong></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h2>&nbsp;</h2> <h2><span><strong>Why Join Us</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li>Work at the intersection of <strong>design, AI, and performance marketing</strong></li> <li>Freedom to experiment with tools and creative ideas</li> <li>Fast-paced, results-driven environment</li> <li>Your work directly impacts business growth</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h2>&nbsp;</h2> <h2><span><strong>How to Apply</strong></span></h2> <p>Please send:</p> <ul> <li>Your portfolio (required)</li> <li>Examples of AI-generated visuals and videos</li>
